name: Old Fashioned Doughnuts No. 2527
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg in a large bowl until it becomes light and lemon-colored.
2. Gradually beat in the sugar. Beat until the mixture thickens.
3. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in a second bowl.
4. Add the dry ingredients, alternating with additions of the melted butter, milk, and vanilla, to the egg mixture. Stir until the flour is moistened.
5. Chill for 1 hour.
6. Preheat the oil in the deep fryer.
7. Roll out on a lightly floured board to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
8. Cut using a floured doughnut cutter.
9. Fry until golden brown (about 1 minute per side).
10. Drain and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
